description: An asset manager needs to plan a program to replace all gas meters that are approaching their end-of-life.

nodes.task_description: Query the asset database to identify all gas meters scheduled for replacement in the next fiscal year.

expected_outcome.expected: System generates a list of 10,000 meters to be replaced.

nodes.task_description: Group the meters by geographic area to create efficient work packages for the field crews.

expected_outcome.expected: System clusters the meters into logical geographic zones.

nodes.task_description: Develop a schedule and budget for the replacement program.

expected_outcome.expected: System produces a project plan with a timeline and cost estimate.
